paper.title: Search-R1+: Tool-Use Reinforcement Learning for Search-Augmented Reasoning Agents
paper.summary: We present Search-R1+, a tool-use reinforcement learning framework that trains reasoning agents to interleave search calls with chain-of-thought.

tldr.text: Trains agents to interleave search and reasoning via RL.

title: Search-R1+: Tool-Use Reinforcement Learning for Search-Augmented Reasoning Agents

paper.title: AnomalyVLM: A Vision-Language Foundation Model for Industrial Anomaly Detection
paper.summary: AnomalyVLM jointly trains vision and language for zero-shot industrial AD across MVTec-AD and VisA, with state-of-the-art localization.

title: AnomalyVLM: A Vision-Language Foundation Model for Industrial Anomaly Detection

paper.title: AgentBench-Pro: A Reproducibility-First Benchmark for LLM Agents
paper.summary: AgentBench-Pro reproduces 30 LLM agent papers with shared infra and reports a credibility score per claim.

title: AgentBench-Pro: A Reproducibility-First Benchmark for LLM Agents
